raw_consumer_statement: On XXXX, I took a flight to XXXX. My mom and I used the XXXX lounge through American Express. Charge was {$50.00}. Upon returning from XXXX, we used the same lounge on XXXX XXXX and I was charged {$100.00}. I was disputing the additional {$50.00}. On the XXXX of XXXX American Express APPROVED the dispute. I then went in to do something on my account and I ACCIDENTALLY closed the dispute/inquiry and American Express went forward with the rebilling of {$50.00}.
